input_topic: why gen z is burnt out before they even start their careers

quality_rubric.hook_quality: hook must immediately address pre-career exhaust/burnout without introductions, favoring direct lowercase delivery
quality_rubric.angle_relevance: focus on the financial mismatch, cost of living pressure, and low generation mental health index (Deloitte/McKinsey statistics)
quality_rubric.seo_notes: target keywords like gen z, pre-career burnout, entry-level fatigue. titles must remain snappy, under 60 characters, with one containing a number and another a question

input_topic: the psychology behind why we procrastinate on things we actually care about

quality_rubric.hook_quality: hook must challenge standard time management advice, immediately stating procrastination is emotional avoidance
quality_rubric.angle_relevance: explain the neuroscience aspect (amygdala threat hijack) and short-term mood repair cycle over lazy self-sabotage
quality_rubric.seo_notes: titles should play on psychological curiosity, targeting terms like procrastination habits, mental resistance, emotion regulation

input_topic: why most productivity advice doesn't work for people with ADHD

quality_rubric.hook_quality: hook must mock traditional planners or rigid time-blocking systems, addressing ADHD executive dysfunction directly
quality_rubric.angle_relevance: contrast neurotypical importance-based motivation with the ADHD interest-based nervous system and dopamine deficiency
quality_rubric.seo_notes: target keyword search terms such as adhd hacks, neurodivergent productivity, executive function deficit. maintain strict title length and validation limits

input_topic: how social media is rewiring our ability to be bored

quality_rubric.hook_quality: hook must address micro-dosing dopamine via constant scrolling and the lost skill of unstructured thoughts
quality_rubric.angle_relevance: explain how constant digital stimulation shifts baseline dopamine thresholds, reducing natural tolerance for passive silence
quality_rubric.seo_notes: focus on search tags like phone addiction, dopamine detox, focus training. ensure titles provoke reflection on digital dependencies

input_topic: why therapy has become a personality trait for millennials

quality_rubric.hook_quality: hook must call out the misuse of therapy speak (gaslighting, narcissism, trauma) in casual dating and friendships
quality_rubric.angle_relevance: discuss the shift from therapy as a healing mechanism to therapy terminology as social identity and shields against criticism
quality_rubric.seo_notes: target millennial habits, therapy speak, clinical buzzwords, self-care culture. maintain the sharp, blunt older sibling narrative voice
